name: io.github.jyswee/gpusmarket
description: Rent real GPUs from the terminal. Per-second billing, $0.50 minimum. stdio MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: GPUSMARKET_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: GPUsMarket API key (gpu_...). Required: the MCP server exits without one. Get a key with 'gpusmarket signup' or from your dashboard.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token using your GPUsMarket API key: 'Bearer gpu_...'. Optional: without one the server starts in onboarding mode and can self-signup via the gpusmarket_signup tool.
